keyPoints: Aligned-ally friction design vs conventional AI tested over four weeks in frontier-aware tasks.
Measure productivity, quality, and learning depth with weekly outputs and expert rubrics.
Leverage reflection-depth as the main mediator for learning depth through mandatory prompts and justification prompts.
Balance frontier and outside-frontier tasks and randomize at the individual level to assess boundary conditions.
Embed governance, ethics, explainability, and audit trails in the interface and data handling.
Pre-register endpoints and use mixed-effects analysis, ITT and per-protocol checks, and moderator tests for frontier status.
